adaptive_policy.diagnose_first: per tensor class, diagnose sensitivity on a calibration wave before committing a rate (planner shape from the F0..F4 adaptive planner)
adaptive_policy.escape_receipt_gate: >1 BPW requires a sealed Escape Receipt (sub-bit-first law); the goal is the sub-bit region, so this gate should not trigger on a passing candidate
adaptive_policy.expert_classes_search: hi_fi first; escalate DOWN into stress (2/5, 1/3, 1/4) only while the frozen gates still hold (sub-bit-first: push toward the stress bracket until a gate breaks)
adaptive_policy.protected_classes_search: hi_fi only (router/attn/embed/output/norms stay native or high hi-fi)
adaptive_policy.stopping_per_class: promote the representation with the HIGHEST layer_hidden_state_cosine within the exact per-class budget; source_native controls excluded from selection

apple_implementation_note.compute: CPU numpy for the forward (wall-safe); MPS only for the RVQ/PQ kmeans+assign packing fit
apple_implementation_note.forward: REAL bounded forward (gptoss_real_forward.py): correct gpt-oss expert activation (interleaved gate/up ::2/1::2, gate.clamp(max=7), up.clip(-7,7), glu=gate*sigmoid(1.702*gate), (up+1)*glu); residual threaded through all 36 blocks; final RMSNorm + unembed -> real logits over vocab 201088
apple_implementation_note.honesty: no capability is claimed by the forward instrument alone; a capability PASS requires the sealed gates on a packed row
apple_implementation_note.lease: ONE Apple heavy lease; G5 must acquire it only after the live G4 controller (pid 48797) releases it. No second heavy forward may run concurrently.
apple_implementation_note.memory: bounded-streaming: one block + a handful of experts resident at a time; ~65 GB read per forward; NO offload; byte-range read-only on the source (no source mutation)
apple_implementation_note.parity: CPU/Metal parity verified; Gen-M lookup-linear is EXACT parity to Gen-F direct-compact (quality-neutral); Gen-F direct-compact is the wall-safe default provider
apple_implementation_note.parity_boundary: empirical-by-coherence, NOT bit-exact vs transformers: the checkpoint is OpenAI-format so a transformers reference cannot be loaded on 96 GB. Coherence smoke ('The capital of France is' -> ' Paris', p=0.405) validates the RoPE + gate/up-interleave conventions

boundaries.one_apple_heavy_lease: held by live G4 controller pid 48797; G5 is PLANNING-only until G4 releases the lease

candidate_organ_mappings.name: source_native_reference
candidate_organ_mappings.representation: MXFP4 native (FP4 blocks + UE8 scales); NO re-quantization
candidate_organ_mappings.role: reference boundary; supplies the parent logits/PPL every candidate is scored against; never promoted

candidate_organ_mappings.billing: exact codebook-aware bits at the assigned uniform rate
candidate_organ_mappings.name: uniform_rvq_control
candidate_organ_mappings.representation: single global Residual-Vector-Quantization rate applied UNIFORMLY to every expert matrix (naive_rvq family)
candidate_organ_mappings.role: naive control: shows what a single global sub-bit rate costs with no tensor-class awareness (expected NEGATIVE, consistent with G0-G3)

candidate_organ_mappings.billing: exact per-tensor-class bits; islands reserve counted in budget
candidate_organ_mappings.name: tensor_class_pq
candidate_organ_mappings.representation: tensor-class-aware Product Quantization: expert_mlp1 = product/shared-grammar PQ; expert_mlp2 = protected-islands (heavy-tail residual-energy reserve)
candidate_organ_mappings.role: the primary Forge hypothesis: mlp1 tolerates shared-grammar product codes, mlp2 needs protected heavy-tail islands

candidate_organ_mappings.name: generation_m_split
candidate_organ_mappings.parity_note: m2_shared_lookup_linear == genf_direct_compact end-to-end (logit cos 1.0, next-token 1.0; operator/expert/layer ~1e-7)
candidate_organ_mappings.representation: Generation-M lookup-linear split providers: M2 base (m2_shared_lookup_linear) / M6 for expert_mlp1 / M4 for expert_mlp2
candidate_organ_mappings.role: tests whether the Gen-M split representation preserves whole-model capability; Gen-M lookup-linear is EXACT parity to Gen-F direct-compact (quality-neutral mechanically), so any divergence is representational, not from the provider

candidate_organ_mappings.billing: exact bits; extra island reserve on router/attn/output counted in budget
candidate_organ_mappings.name: generation_m_split_plus_islands
candidate_organ_mappings.representation: C3 (M2/M6/M4 split) PLUS additional protected precision islands on router + attention + output
candidate_organ_mappings.role: tests whether widening the protected set past the experts (router/attn/output) recovers capability the C3 split loses

candidate_organ_mappings.billing: budget PINNED to the winning candidate's total bits (equal-byte comparison)
candidate_organ_mappings.name: equal_byte_conventional_control
candidate_organ_mappings.representation: conventional uniform low-bit quantizer (round-to-nearest / GPTQ-style int) sized to the SAME total bytes as the best PQ candidate (C2/C3/C4 winner)
candidate_organ_mappings.role: conventional baseline at equal budget: does the Forge/island machinery beat an off-the-shelf quantizer at the same bytes? (falsification control)

checkpointing.controller: durable singleton (gravity_frontier_g4 pattern): per-row SEALED checkpoints; crash/resume survives controller restart
checkpointing.durability: reparented to init pgid (survives terminal/chat/IDE closure) + caffeinate blocks idle sleep; NOT installed as a reboot-persistent launchd agent (repo convention + persistent-config caution)
checkpointing.lease_guard: single heavy lease file; a second controller refuses to start while the lease is live

heavy_tail_island_budget_frac.note: residual-energy islands reserve a small fraction of the budget for the heaviest-tail weights (G3 default 0.01)

doctor_reserves.purpose: Doctor = protected precision islands (heavy-tail residual-energy reserve) + optional KD/QAT recovery; its bytes are COUNTED in the exact budget, never free
doctor_reserves.recovery: KD/QAT recovery reserve optional per candidate (C4); billed in budget; PROVEN mechanism from the doctor track

exact_total_bit_budgets.protected_islands_billing: router / attn / embed / final_norm / unembed billed at native (or near-native) and counted in the whole-model total; only expert_mlp1/mlp2 carry the sub-bit stress
exact_total_bit_budgets.whole_model_total_bit_law: sum over every tensor class of (n_weights * native_bpw_class * assigned_rate); packer FAILS the row if realized bits exceed the exact target

executor.note: G5 uses the REAL G4 forward (correct gpt-oss activation, residual threaded through 36 blocks, real logits over vocab 201088), NOT the from-config relative-only approximation used by G0-G3
executor.packer: gravity_forge full-rank Product-Quantization Forge (7 verbs + protected precision islands + Doctor); MPS for kmeans/assign fit only

capability_ppl_gate_G5_proposed.honesty: distinguish inherited-sealed (kl, argmax) from G5-proposed (ppl tolerance); freeze all before first result
capability_ppl_gate_G5_proposed.status: FROZEN_AT_G5_IGNITION (proposed; NOT inherited-sealed). A passing candidate must keep every capability probe's PPL within +2% of the parent baseline. Labeled proposed to stay honest: only kl<=0.10 and argmax>=0.95 are inherited-sealed.

frozen_quality_gates.freeze_law: all thresholds frozen at G5 ignition BEFORE the first result; not lowered after seeing results (same law as G4 sealed_thresholds)

inherited_sealed_from_G4.status: SEALED (inherited verbatim from G4; binding promotion gate)

hash_discipline.reason: stable program identity across regeneration (timestamp-hash bug fix, same discipline as G2/G3)

parent_ppl_baseline.provenance: measured by the real G4 forward (self-NLL/PPL on real tokenizer output); never-before-measured reference

row_generation.escalation: per expert tensor class, walk the hi_fi bracket down while gates hold, then into stress; protected classes fixed at native/high-hi-fi
row_generation.estimated_candidate_rows: 6 (C0 probes) + 5 candidates x 2 expert classes x (up to 12 rate rungs) = up to ~126 expert rows per full sweep, gated adaptively (most rows pruned by diagnose-first)
row_generation.note: exact row count is adaptive (diagnose-first prunes); the program defines the search space + gates, the controller materializes rows
row_generation.seed_wave: C0 reference on all 6 capability probes (parent logits/PPL) + C1..C5 on the two expert classes at the hi-fi entry rate (3/4), diagnose-first

scope.claim_scope: whole-artifact BPW; capability-preserving sub-bit; the G5 escalation of the G0..G4 ladder from single-layer/short-forward to the full model + full real-forward capability eval
scope.expert_coverage: full 128 experts per MoE layer (no expert subsampling)
scope.layers: all 36 blocks (residual threaded 0..35 + final RMSNorm + unembed)

source_lifecycle_states.integrity_freeze_rule: after ANY terminal cell the source is integrity-frozen (resume + compile both refuse); a frozen campaign needs a fresh run, not an in-place resume
source_lifecycle_states.release_rule: F0 source is released to admit F1 (235B) per the one-parent storage law; release is what unlocks the next rung

HONEST_BOUNDARY.action: seal the honest negative boundary; report the best-achieved (rate, layer_hidden_state_cosine, logit_kl, argmax_agreement, per-probe PPL) as the honest frontier; do NOT lower thresholds; do NOT claim capability
HONEST_BOUNDARY.condition: no candidate crosses the sealed gates at any admissible rate
HONEST_BOUNDARY.consistency: this is the EXPECTED outcome and is a real, publishable result (the honest sub-bit boundary at whole-model real-forward fidelity)

PASS.action: seal an Event-Horizon capability candidate + (if effective BPW>1) a sealed Escape Receipt; record the passing (rate, divergence) per tensor class
PASS.condition: a packed WHOLE-MODEL candidate meets BOTH sealed gates (logit_mean_sym_kl <= 0.10 AND next_token_argmax_agreement >= 0.95) AND every capability probe stays within the frozen +2% PPL tolerance, at a sub-bit (<1 BPW effective) rate
PASS.expectation: LOW prior: G0-G3 proxy + Second-Light 0.688 divergence + expected-NEGATIVE G4 all point sub-bit-negative; a PASS would be a genuine surprise

TERMINATION.all_rows_sealed: program final=true when every planned row is sealed or pruned
TERMINATION.budget_exhaustion: a tensor class stops escalating when the packer fails the exact budget at the next rate
TERMINATION.per_class: promote highest layer_hidden_state_cosine within the exact per-class budget; controls excluded

title: GPT-OSS-120B adaptive whole-model condensation program (Part IV/13, gate G5)
